chunks.text: Ketan Barber Shop services and prices: Haircut 199 INR, Beard Trim 99 INR, Haircut plus Beard 249 INR, Kids Haircut 149 INR, Head Massage 199 INR, Facial 399 INR.
Shop opening hours are 9 AM to 9 PM every day. Last walk-in is 8:30 PM. Sunday is open.
Appointments can be booked by phone. Preferred slots are 10:00, 11:30, 16:00, and 18:00. Customers should arrive 5 minutes early.
Cancellation policy: cancel at least 1 hour before slot. Late arrival over 15 minutes may require rebooking. Payment modes: cash, UPI, and card.
Ketan Barber Shop is in Ahmedabad, Gujarat near Navrangpura. Parking is available on the main road.
